PR surface: Tests +84, Docs -19, Config 0, Other 0. Total +65 across 7 files.

target.title: docs: clarify maturity scorecard scoring
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The maturity scorecard rendered Coverage as a headline score beside Quality and Completeness, which made coverage look like an input to maturity scoring. The QA Profile Evidence workflow also defaulted to the narrower `release` profile while the maturity scorecard workflow is intended to render full taxonomy evidence.

## Why This Change Was Made

- Render one headline `Maturity score` from Quality + Completeness only.
- Keep Coverage, Quality, and Completeness visible in the scorecard metadata and surface/category tables.
- Document the goal of keeping end-to-end coverage above 90% for mature Stable-or-better features over time.
- Default QA Profile Evidence dispatches and generated maturity evidence to the `all` profile.
- Reject failed or blocked evidence unconditionally before rendering generated maturity docs.

The generated docs were refreshed from QA Profile Evidence run `28008797812` after locally sanitizing the two blocked UX Matrix entries to `skipped` with no coverage, per maintainer direction, so the other evidence could be used without claiming coverage for those blocked checks.

## User Impact

Readers now see that OpenClaw maturity is scored from quality and completeness, while coverage remains visible as supporting evidence and a long-term E2E coverage target. Maintainers get full-taxonomy QA evidence by default when refreshing the scorecard.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/render-maturity-docs.test.ts test/scripts/ci-workflow-guards.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 scripts/qa/render-maturity-docs.ts test/scripts/render-maturity-docs.test.ts test/scripts/ci-workflow-guards.test.ts`
- `pnpm maturity:check -- --evidence-dir /tmp/openclaw-maturity-sanitized.qHxC7T --strict-inputs`
- `pnpm format:docs:check`
- `actionlint .github/workflows/qa-profile-evidence.yml .github/workflows/maturity-scorecard.yml`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
